steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The blank falls between a subject noun phrase (“Her portrait of novelist Zadie Smith”) and a verb phrase (“is displayed in the National Portrait Gallery in London”).

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: The rule is: do not insert punctuation between a subject and its verb. A comma between subject and verb violates this rule, while a colon and em dash would introduce elaboration or emphasis not present in the sentence. That confirms C is correct.
